## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing partnership between Imubit and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive content strategy, creation, and SEO services to build audience and authority](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Imubit has limited content/traffic currently; opportunity to establish thought leadership in niche industrial AI space](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes 12-week ramp-up, starting with strategy/audits and quickly moving to content production](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Partnership could help Imubit expand reach beyond current oil & gas focus into new verticals](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)

## Topics

### Imubit's Current Marketing Situation

  - [2 years into marketing efforts after previously being sales-driven](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Focused on account-based marketing to engineers/plant operators](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Limited digital presence; turned off some paid search due to poor targeting](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Recently started producing more consistent blog content](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Website refresh coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Capabilities

  - [Content strategy focused on becoming trusted industry resource](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Rapid ramp-up: strategy in weeks 1-3, publishing by week 4-5](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Use AI + expert editors to produce high-quality, targeted content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [Technical SEO audits and improvements](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=2031.0)
  - [Link building via customer network, brokers, and outreach](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [Custom workflows for regulated/technical industries](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=2766.0)

### Proposed Engagement Structure

  - [Two workstreams: 1) Content refresh/creation 2) Backlink building](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=2498.0)
  - [12-week initial engagement to establish strategy and processes](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Focus first on building traffic/audience before optimizing conversions](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=2031.0)
  - [Collaboration with Imubit SMEs, especially on novel topics](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)

### Potential Challenges/Considerations

  - [Imubit has limited internal resources for content review](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=2625.0)
  - [Need to establish clear quality bar during calibration phase](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=2899.0)
  - [Some topics may require significant Imubit SME input due to novelty](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tim and Rebecca to discuss internally, including with CEO](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=3060.0)
  - [Review proposal and scope document shared by Tim](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=3089.0)
  - [Connect with GrowthX finance team for final contract details](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=3089.0)
  - [Aim to make decision quickly to secure May 12 start date](https://fathom.video/share/AhXyjQ89a97qMNmNbvzGyew6qRqvk766?tab=summary&timestamp=3060.0)
